dialogue.text: I am a bird imprisoned by you, already forgotten how high the sky is
dialogue.zh: 我是被你囚禁的鳥 已經忘了天有多高
dialogue.ja: 我是被你囚禁的鳥 已經忘了天有多高
dialogue.local: 我是被你囚禁的鳥 已經忘了天有多高
dialogue.local_pron: wo shi bei ni qiu jin de niao yi jing wang le tian you duo gao
dialogue.zh_pron: wo shi bei ni qiu jin de niao yi jing wang le tian you duo gao

dialogue.text: If I leave the small castle you gave me, I don't know who else I can rely on
dialogue.zh: 如果離開你給我的小小城堡 不知還有誰能依靠
dialogue.ja: 如果離開你給我的小小城堡 不知還有誰能依靠
dialogue.local: 如果離開你給我的小小城堡 不知還有誰能依靠
dialogue.local_pron: ru guo li kai ni gei wo de xiao xiao cheng bao bu zhi hai you shui neng yi kao
dialogue.zh_pron: ru guo li kai ni gei wo de xiao xiao cheng bao bu zhi hai you shui neng yi kao

dialogue.text: I am a bird imprisoned by you, the love I get is less and less
dialogue.zh: 我是被你囚禁的鳥 得到的愛越來越少
dialogue.ja: 我是被你囚禁的鳥 得到的愛越來越少
dialogue.local: 我是被你囚禁的鳥 得到的愛越來越少
dialogue.local_pron: wo shi bei ni qiu jin de niao de dao de ai yue lai yue shao
dialogue.zh_pron: wo shi bei ni qiu jin de niao de dao de ai yue lai yue shao

dialogue.text: Watching your smile burn in others' eyes
dialogue.zh: 看著你的笑 在別人眼中燃燒
dialogue.ja: 看著你的笑 在別人眼中燃燒
dialogue.local: 看著你的笑 在別人眼中燃燒
dialogue.local_pron: kan zhe ni de xiao zai bie ren yan zhong ran shao
dialogue.zh_pron: kan zhe ni de xiao zai bie ren yan zhong ran shao

dialogue.text: But I can't get a single hug
dialogue.zh: 我卻要不到一個擁抱
dialogue.ja: 我卻要不到一個擁抱
dialogue.local: 我卻要不到一個擁抱
dialogue.local_pron: wo que yao bu dao yi ge yong bao
dialogue.zh_pron: wo que yao bu dao yi ge yong bao

dialogue.text: I am like a shadow that you can have or not
dialogue.zh: 我像是一個你可有可無的影子
dialogue.ja: 我像是一個你可有可無的影子
dialogue.local: 我像是一個你可有可無的影子
dialogue.local_pron: wo xiang shi yi ge ni ke you ke wu de ying zi
dialogue.zh_pron: wo xiang shi yi ge ni ke you ke wu de ying zi

dialogue.text: Coldly watching your lying appearance
dialogue.zh: 冷冷地看著你說謊的樣子
dialogue.ja: 冷冷地看著你說謊的樣子
dialogue.local: 冷冷地看著你說謊的樣子
dialogue.local_pron: leng leng de kan zhe ni shuo huang de yang zi
dialogue.zh_pron: leng leng de kan zhe ni shuo huang de yang zi

dialogue.text: This chaotic city cannot hold my obsession
dialogue.zh: 這撩亂的城市 容不下我的痴
dialogue.ja: 這撩亂的城市 容不下我的痴
dialogue.local: 這撩亂的城市 容不下我的痴
dialogue.local_pron: zhe liao luan de cheng shi rong bu xia wo de chi
dialogue.zh_pron: zhe liao luan de cheng shi rong bu xia wo de chi

dialogue.text: What makes you so obsessed and so reckless
dialogue.zh: 是什麼讓你這樣迷戀這樣的放肆
dialogue.ja: 是什麼讓你這樣迷戀這樣的放肆
dialogue.local: 是什麼讓你這樣迷戀這樣的放肆
dialogue.local_pron: shi shen me rang ni zhe yang mi lian zhe yang de fang si
dialogue.zh_pron: shi shen me rang ni zhe yang mi lian zhe yang de fang si

dialogue.text: I am like a shadow that you can have or not
dialogue.zh: 我像是一個你可有可無的影子
dialogue.ja: 我像是一個你可有可無的影子
dialogue.local: 我像是一個你可有可無的影子
dialogue.local_pron: wo xiang shi yi ge ni ke you ke wu de ying zi
dialogue.zh_pron: wo xiang shi yi ge ni ke you ke wu de ying zi

dialogue.text: Exchanging sad thoughts with loneliness
dialogue.zh: 和寂寞交換著悲傷的心事
dialogue.ja: 和寂寞交換著悲傷的心事
dialogue.local: 和寂寞交換著悲傷的心事
dialogue.local_pron: he ji mo jiao huan zhe bei shang de xin shi
dialogue.zh_pron: he ji mo jiao huan zhe bei shang de xin shi

dialogue.text: Helpless in love, this tasteless day
dialogue.zh: 對愛無計可施 這無味的日子
dialogue.ja: 對愛無計可施 這無味的日子
dialogue.local: 對愛無計可施 這無味的日子
dialogue.local_pron: dui ai wu ji ke shi zhe wu wei de ri zi
dialogue.zh_pron: dui ai wu ji ke shi zhe wu wei de ri zi

dialogue.text: Tears are the only luxury
dialogue.zh: 眼淚是唯一的奢侈
dialogue.ja: 眼淚是唯一的奢侈
dialogue.local: 眼淚是唯一的奢侈
dialogue.local_pron: yan lei shi wei yi de she chi
dialogue.zh_pron: yan lei shi wei yi de she chi
